description_long: This is a rectangular, upright vending machine with a predominantly black exterior, featuring visible graffiti and stickers on its sides and front. The front face has a large glass display window showing multiple rows of products, a keypad, a coin slot, and a product retrieval slot, all set within a metallic frame. The top of the machine is flat and black, with an orange cable draped across it, adding a touch of color contrast. The sides and back are mostly plain black, with more graffiti and a continuation of the orange cable, which appears to be loosely attached. The machine's lower front section has a vented grille, likely for cooling or ventilation. The overall appearance is urban and slightly worn, suggesting it is situated in a public or outdoor environment.
description: A black, graffiti-marked vending machine with a glass product window, keypad, and orange cable, set in a metallic frame. The front features a display, payment interface, and retrieval slot, while the sides and back are plain with graffiti.
description_view_0: The left side of the vending machine, mostly black with graffiti and an orange cable running vertically down the surface.
description_view_1: The front view shows the glass product window, keypad, coin slot, product retrieval slot, and vented grille, with some stickers and graffiti.
description_view_2: The right side is black with red graffiti and a white tag, plus a small sticker, and the orange cable is visible at the top.
description_view_3: The back is plain black with four corner screws and an orange cable loosely attached, with no visible features or graffiti.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is located on the upper right section of the front face, adjacent to the keypad and payment interface, with a dark background and some illuminated or printed content.
attribute_payment_interface: The payment interface includes a coin slot, bill acceptor, and card reader, all located on the right side of the front panel, with distinct slots and a keypad for input.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A vertical keypad with individual buttons is present on the right side of the front face, labeled for product selection.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular product retrieval slot is located at the lower center of the front face, beneath the product display window, with a flap or door.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Graffiti, stickers, and tags are visible on the front and sides, but there is no clear commercial branding or logo.
